title: CIT Resewn Spyglass Fix
description: A simple add-on for CIT Resewn that enables custom spyglass models to display when held.
body: Standard behavior in CIT Resewn when adding custom spyglasses is to use the default vanilla spyglass model when the item is held by the player. This simple add-on fixes that in order to allow custom spyglass models to display in the third person when held.
